description:
Create a new Sales Quotation in Axelor for customer Patagonia Inc. Log in with admin / admin, then navigate to the Sales module (top menu bar or sidebar) and create a new quotation with the following details:

- Customer: Patagonia Inc. (already exists in the system)
- Add product line 1: Ergonomic Standing Desk - Height Adjustable, Quantity: 10, Unit Price: $749.99
- Add product line 2: Premium Mesh Task Chair, Quantity: 15, Unit Price: $549.99
- Add product line 3: 27-inch 4K IPS Monitor, Quantity: 10, Unit Price: $429.99

After adding all lines, save the quotation. Do NOT confirm it — leave it in Draft status.

Login credentials: admin / admin
